claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking...

claims.text: Bridging the 'sim-to-real' gap and managing high training latencies are significant bottlenecks for practical deployment of DRL in underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: ...bridging the 'sim-to-real' gap and managing high training latencies remain significant bottlenecks for practical deployment.

claims.text: The Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) was used in a systematic approach for autonomous docking.
claims.source_quote: This paper presents a systematic approach for autonomous docking using the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV)...

claims.text: The Stonefish simulator was adapted into a multiprocessing RL framework to accelerate the learning process.
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process...

claims.text: The adapted simulator incorporates realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.
claims.source_quote: ...while incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.

claims.text: A 6-DoF control policy was developed using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm.
claims.source_quote: Using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, we developed a 6-DoF control policy...

claims.text: The control policy was trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions.
claims.source_quote: ...trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance.

claims.text: The reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties.
claims.source_quote: Our reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties...

claims.text: The agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation.
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that the agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation.

claims.text: Successful validation in a physical test tank confirmed the efficacy of the sim-to-reality adaptation.
claims.source_quote: Furthermore, successful validation in a physical test tank confirmed the efficacy of the sim-to-reality adaptation...

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations.
claims.source_quote: ...with the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment.
